rows.notes: Clear printed year in left margin, unambiguous.
Month abbreviation in left margin, clearly legible.
Centered page title; handwriting clear and unambiguous.
Rightmost amount reads '234 8 10 1/4' (quarter-penny shown as a small loop/mark). Vertical alignment of pounds/shillings/pence columns is clear on this prominent carried-forward line.

rows.description: Two Poors Taxes & St. Nic's. Parish
rows.notes: Description legible. Amount columns read '00 15 4' with clear alignment; shillings and pence within valid ranges.
Short description (Buttery Book) clear. Amount '00 11 6' is distinct and columns well aligned.
Month label in left margin; clear.

rows.description: To the servants for Claymonds for Illumination
rows.notes: Description partially long but legible enough to identify purpose. Amount reads '00 04 6' aligned under columns.
Phrase 'one Poors Tax per month' interpreted from cursive; amount '00 07 8' is clearly placed and digits distinct.

rows.description: Subscr. for Trigonometry by Nikitin Jaworoff

rows.description: Bible Clerk for Mitchells Pension from Wm Wright for half year

Short phrase 'The same as...' readable; word interpreted as 'heb. librarian' (handwritten abbreviation). Amount '03 03 0' matches prior entry alignment.

rows.description: 2d Years subscr. to Holmes Coll. Sepng. Version
rows.notes: Description contains abbreviations; interpreted as a two-year subscription. Amount '05 05 0' clearly shown.

rows.description: Glazier Smith in Part of the ch.

Month label in left margin; legible.
Description 'Garden & paving Court' read from cursive. Amount '00 18 0' clear and within valid ranges.
Month label in left margin; clear.

rows.description: Act. Books for Midst. Dr. engraving
rows.notes: Description partly abbreviated ('Act. Books for Midst...'). Amount '00 15 6' clear; handwriting for description moderately legible.
Name read as 'Mr. Randolph' though surname could be slightly different; amount '04 17 1' is readable but pence '1' is small and required careful alignment check against ruled columns.
Month label in left margin, clear.
Item description read as 'Brussany' (could be variant spelling). Amount '00 02 8' clearly placed and legible.
Description 'Sibly' uncertain but consistent with other lines; amount '00 14 2' clear.
Another similar 'Garden & Sibly Court' line; amount '00 11 6' clearly read. May be a separate charge.
Left-margin abbreviation 'Agt.' (August) visible though slightly condensed; identified as month header.
Short phrase 'At Buttery Book' read from cursive; amount '02 09 0' clear though leading '2' pounds has slight flourish.
Description is crossed and abbreviated ('Paid Table...' interpreted). Amount '02 06 0' readable; description uncertain due to strike-through but enough context to record as entry.
Phrase 'Poors Taxes to Parish officers' legible. Amount '00 11 6' clear in columns.
Label read as 'Gaol Tax &c.' but ink slightly lighter; amount '00 11 6' appears again and is legible. Possible duplication with previous line; kept as separate row as on page.
Description 'Coals Bill for Hall & kitchen' readable; amount '03 09 4' clear though pence digit small, alignment checked against totals line.
Short entry 'For Library Do.' (do. = ditto). Amount '00 07 3' clear; description abbreviated but placement indicates library expense.
Entry 'Dinner for Octr. 5.' is legible; amount '00 11 4' clear. Month 'Octr.' is explicit in description.

rows.notes: Phrase 'The same half year wages as heb. librarian' read from script. Amount '03 03 0' clear and consistent with similar entries.
